response.justification: Bogdan brings 13+ years of polyglot full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ year requirement, with recent hands-on work in the exact primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) at Naver and Tencent, plus direct AI-agent/MCP infrastructure experience that matches the JD's AI agent requirement. He has solid testing/craftsmanship credentials (TDD, CI/CD, workshops on testing) and cloud/container exposure via AWS CDK and Kubernetes. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience and limited recent Vitest mention, but the breadth and depth strongly suggest he can ramp quickly.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack across TS/Node/React with recent senior roles at Naver and Tencent
Direct AI agent and MCP framework experience matching a key JD requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, AWS CDK, MongoDB, Docker/Kubernetes
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the resume
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is older (pre-2018)
Vitest specifically not called out, though Jest/testing background is evident

key_factors.factor: Seniority and breadth far exceeding 6+ years
